title: Horror Movie: A Low Budget Nightmare
original_title: Horror Movie: A Low Budget Nightmare
overview: A filmmaker's lifelong dream quickly becomes his worst nightmare when he attempts to make a low budget horror film about an aborted fetus that seeks revenge on its family.
